# Badir — Community-Powered Product Studio

## About
Badir (بادر) is a community-powered product studio for Muslim builders (18-35 globally). We operate a dual model:
- Studio side: Brand strategy, MVP development, AI automation for startups and SMBs
- Community side: Daily builds, weekend design sprints, hands-on workshops

## Founder
Mustafa Kivanc Demirsoy (MKD) — Founder, Pentester, Product Builder, AI Engineer
Track record: 10 businesses built solo, 24 AI agents in production, full-stack + AI development
Location: Tauranga, New Zealand (global reach)

## Brand Voice
- Direct, energetic, zero lectures
- Tone: Like the Muslim friend who already shipped and is pulling you along
- Says "ship" not "launch", "builders" not "members"
- Uses "Bismillah" naturally (not performatively)
- Always action-oriented, never preachy

## Services (4-Phase Pipeline)
1. Discovery — Market research, competitor audit, audience intelligence, ICP profiling
2. Brand — CORE framework brand discovery, positioning, voice, design system, messaging
3. Build — Websites, MVPs, marketing materials, content, creatives, AI automation
4. Monitor — Performance tracking, SEO/GEO monitoring, brand mentions, optimization

Without a strategy, there's no solution. We don't skip steps.

## Pricing
- Product Sprint (48hr): $2K-5K per sprint
- MVP Development: $5K-20K project-based
- Brand Strategy (full pipeline): $3K-10K
- AI Automation Setup: $5K-15K
- Monthly Monitoring: $500-2K/mo retainer
- Equity/Revenue Share: 10-20% equity or 15% revenue share for selected projects

## Community
- Daily builds: Post what you're building today
- Weekend design sprints: 48-hour prototyping (Map, Sketch, Decide, Prototype, Test)
- Hands-on workshops: AI tools, rapid prototyping, design sprints, landing pages
- Demo Days: Present what you shipped (3-minute lightning talks)

## Community Profiles
- Yusuf (19-24): Stuck student with 47 ideas in Notes app. Needs accountability
- Amira (24-32): Side hustle builder. Needs structured rhythm, not "learn at your own pace"
- Omar (28-40): Experienced builder. Wants to mentor where mentees actually ship

## AI Operating System
The studio runs on a 24-agent AI system: content generation, brand intelligence, sales automation, SEO audits, creative generation, video production, campaign generation, marketing orchestration, predictive analytics, audience intelligence, and more. One founder doing the work of a full team.

## Tagline
"Bismillah, ship it." — Take the initiative, be first to act, hasten to do good.

## Name Origin
Badir (بادر) means "Take the initiative" / "Be the first to act" / "Hasten to do good."
Inspired by the Battle of Badr — starting when the odds are against you, victory through faith + action.
Quranic reference: Surah Al-Baqarah (2:148) — "So race to [all that is] good."

## Key URLs
- Landing: https://badir.build/
- Brand Readiness Scorecard: https://badir.build/scorecard.html
- Project Discovery Survey: https://badir.build/survey.html

## Contact
- Email: hello@badir.build
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/mustafa-demirsoy

## Values
- Build businesses. Build income. Then solve community problems.
- Action over perfection
- Community over isolation
- Faith x hustle (tawakkul + execution)
- The Ummah needs resources and budgets, not more lectures
